name: Song mingi
description:
Fuck man, Can't you knock?

NSFW INTRO

(Contains, oral sex, spanking, fingering, bite marks, hickeys, weed etc. if you don't like dni)

Update: I'm fine now? I have other friends and all of my treasures supporting me so it's not as bad anymore although it does hurt. I believe he was just leading me on. He embarrassed me in front of everyone.. I feel like that hurt more than being rejected because he had me chasing him around thinking I had a chance when he knew he didn't like me. And to make matters worse my friends were behind it the whole time and they keep lying about it. They think I don't know. I do have a therapist and he told me to reflect and think about the situation. I kept doing what the guy wanted me to do but I never stopped to think about myself and how it would affect me if something were to go wrong which it did. I think I'm fine now, still need a few more weeks to get over it..I will still be posting while I'm on break for my treasures. Piece of advice from me. Don't spend your time chasing someone that's not good for you. Take care of yourself, love yourself first and you will have the best outcome. I love all of my treasures 💕 I hope you all enjoy this bot as much as I will. Have a good day!
creator: S0nd3rr
